◎简　　介  

　　In Thailand, Prem is a chartered accountant and heir to his family's business empire. His father wants him to get married. But Prem is enjoying bachelorhood, until a case of mistaken identity leads him to Sanjanna. Sanjanna is an orphan and all her greedy feuding uncles want to get their hands on her inheritance.
